mainEntity.name: What even is answer engine optimization for attorneys and do I need it?

acceptedAnswer.text: AEO optimizes law firm content to be recommended by AI answer engines like Perplexity, differing from SEO by targeting AI citations.[2][3] Start with question-answering FAQs and local details.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Answer engine optimization (AEO) helps law firms get recommended by AI tools like ChatGPT or Perplexity when users ask legal questions.** It differs from traditional SEO by focusing on being cited in AI-generated answers rather than just search rankings.[2][3]

AEO matters because AI search is replacing Google results; firms not optimized risk invisibility.[6][7] In competitive markets like New York or Los Angeles, early adopters gain leads.

**Key factors:**
- Create content answering common client questions directly.
- Use attorney bios, local procedural details, and resource links for credibility (EEAT).[2]
- Update FAQs regularly for fresh relevance.[3]
- Focus on utility like court addresses or forms.[2]

Audit your site for AEO: add question-based pages, attribute authors. Test by querying AI tools about your practice area. Nationwide firms should prioritize this now.[6]
